results.name: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Frequency-band partitioning of RoPE dims; no monochord/flexor/septimal/microtonal harmonic-node anchors.

results.name: Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV
results.rationale: Mixed-frequency RoPE for KV compression; lacks 7 discrete harmonic-fraction anchors, flexor-style continuous interpolation.

results.name: TAPA Token-Aware Phase Attention
results.rationale: Token-aware phase modulation in attention; no single-string shared substrate across K heads, no fixed {1/2..7/8} fractional anchors.

results.name: DoPE Denoising RoPE
results.rationale: Denoising-based RoPE adjustment; no harmonic-node anchors, no flexor continuous bend, no septimal/non-12-TET structure.

results.name: PEPE Long-Context Harmonic Mean EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Term 'harmonic' appears but refers to harmonic mean for long-context, not flageolet harmonic-node fractions.

results.name: YaRN Efficient Context Window Extension
results.rationale: NTK-by-parts frequency scaling for context extension; no discrete fractional anchors with continuous interpolation.

results.name: Q-ROAR RoPE Scaling Quantized
results.rationale: Quantization-aware RoPE scaling; no monochord-style single substrate, no 7 harmonic-fraction anchors.

results.name: Revisiting Multimodal Positional Encoding
results.rationale: Multimodal PE analysis; no single-string shared K-head substrate, no fractional harmonic-node anchors.

decision_rationale: None of the 8 RoPE/positional-encoding works implement the DANBAU full composite mechanism. All scores below thresholds. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.90 / func 0.74-0.90 on Frequency-Bands-RoPE + TAPA + PEPE + YaRN adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
